prompt: Hyper-realistic cinematic shot of a Red Bull can bursting with icy mist. Frost crystals form over the aluminum surface while cold vapor clouds explode outward. Frozen splash particles surround the can. Background is dark black-blue with glowing cold light rays. Ultra dramatic lighting, high contrast, macro photography style, cinematic commercial advertising look. Ultra-detailed textures, 4K UHD realism. Ice explosion and cold mist atmosphere.

Ultra-realistic futuristic cinematic portrait of a man standing confidently in a minimalist studio. Moody lighting with soft shadows and a clean dark background. He wears a sleek layered jacket with subtle tech textures, modern fabrics, hidden seams and minimal accessories. Mid-shot to full-body framing, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on subject, slightly blurred background. Soft rim light and key light with cinematic contrast. Cool desaturated futuristic color tone. Editorial fashion photography style, 85mm lens, f/1.8, HDR, film-grade grading, ultra detailed skin and fabric textures.

Hyper-realistic candid winter scene of a young woman kneeling in a snowy field hugging a Siberian Husky. She wears a large brown faux fur ushanka hat and a thick black fur coat. Her face shows a natural rosy cold blush and a warm gentle smile. The Husky has icy blue eyes, thick fur and snow resting on its head and nose. Snow falls heavily in a soft, overcast rural landscape with blurred farmhouses and trees in the background. Cinematic depth, soft diffused lighting, high detail, 8K raw photography style.

High-quality anime-style cinematic illustration of a human character riding a Pegasus at high speed. The Pegasus flies powerfully with strong wing motion cutting through the wind. The rider leans forward maintaining balance, holding reins naturally with a focused and cool expression. Hair and clothing flow dynamically with the motion. Aerial scene emphasizing speed and tension. Preserve Pegasus design and composition, no extra characters or elements. Cinematic lighting, unified color palette, 16:9 aspect ratio.

Photorealistic cinematic portrait of a professional Formula 1 racer standing beside a Ferrari Formula 1 car. The racer wears a red Ferrari racing suit with detailed sponsor patches, gloves and boots. Confident posture, calm focused expression. The F1 car is glossy red with aerodynamic details and reflections, positioned for visual impact. Background is a modern pit lane with soft depth of field. Sports editorial photography style, ultra realistic textures, cinematic grading, 8K resolution, sharp focus.

High-fashion cinematic scene of a stylish young man and a female farmer harvesting potatoes together. The man wears a tailored charcoal suit while the woman wears denim overalls, plaid shirt and straw hat. Joyful collaborative expressions. Golden hour sunlight creates warm highlights and long shadows. DSLR photography style with shallow depth of field, sharp focus on subjects and potatoes. Cinematic editorial aesthetic with rich earthy tones, vibrant greens and warm gold grading, 8K ultra HD.

Hyper-realistic studio portrait of a stylish person interacting with a 3D photorealistic Tom and Jerry. The person wears a light grey knitted sweater, high-waisted jeans and white sneakers, with a playful mischievous expression. Tom appears confident and Jerry playful on Tom’s shoulder. Clean grey-blue studio background, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, high resolution, polished finish, seamless integration of cartoon and realism.

Minimalist ink gesture sketch of a subject, drawn with loose expressive black lines on off-white canvas. Dynamic motion captured in imperfect strokes with varied line weight. Raw artistic energy and strong use of negative space. Modern editorial illustration style focused on simplicity and expression over detail.

Exploded view of a taco presented like a clean commercial recipe infographic. Components arranged vertically: tomato sauce, cheddar cheese, grilled chicken, lettuce and wheat taco bread. Each element is separated with precise spacing and annotated with labels and gram weights. Minimal neutral background, sans-serif typography, thin connector lines, educational and commercial design style with high clarity and organization.
